autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant QMD search results into agent context

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically index MEMORY.md and memory/*.md files into QMD

searchMode.label: Search Mode
searchMode.help: Default search mode: query (hybrid, best quality), vsearch (semantic), search (keyword)

maxResults.label: Max Results
maxResults.help: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 5)
